summary: Frontend-only testing of Iteration 8 (PlansComparator section). All 12 review-request criteria verified end-to-end on the public preview URL: section mounted below #precios, default 'combo' mode renders 4 columns + 18 rows, toggle to 'marketing' renders 3 columns + 11 rows and back, true/false/string cells render as Check / Minus / literal text (lucide SVGs counted = 60), Gold has 'Más elegido' badge, Diamond Premium has white 'Top tier' badge, prices formatted with comma thousands (US$ 1,997/mes verified), CTA buttons open Calendly in new tab with utm_source=automatikmedia&utm_medium=comparator&utm_content=<plan_id>, POST /api/events fires with name='comparator_cta_click', variant='comparator', metadata={plan, mode}. Mobile 390px: body has no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==innerWidth==390), inner wrapper has overflow-x:auto with scrollWidth 900>clientWidth 340, feature label cells are position:sticky left:0px and the header first cell is also sticky. Regression: landing page loads, #precios still present, no console errors observed. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: PlansComparator.jsx (~393 lines) is fine size-wise but the large COMPARISON catalog could be extracted to a data file (e.g. /lib/comparator-data.js) for easier content edits without re-reading the component logic.

track() uses fire-and-forget with try/catch + .catch(()=>{}). OK for analytics, but consider adding an AbortController/timeout shared util to standardize across Pricing/ExitIntent/PlansComparator (DRY).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PlansComparator is fully working. Calendly URL captured = https://calendly.com/cheloxnz/30min?utm_source=automatikmedia&utm_medium=comparator&utm_content=<plan_id>. Event POST payload verified shape {name, variant, metadata:{plan,mode}}. Mobile sticky test must target a feature row cell (e.g. [data-testid=comparator-row-0-0] td:first-child) — NOT the first tbody td, which is the group-separator td with colspan.
